user.title: SolarAssistant
user.description: Both authentication methods connect to your SolarAssistant unit on your local network.

local.title: Local password
local.description: Enter the IP/hostname of your unit and its web password. [How to find or set your web password](https://solar-assistant.io/help/access/password)

cloud.title: Cloud API key
cloud.description: Generate an API key at https://solar-assistant.io/user/edit#api and paste it below.

pick_site.title: Select a site
pick_site.description: Choose which site to add. Repeat the integration to add more.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the SolarAssistant unit. Check the host is reachable.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the password or API key.
error.no_sites: Your SolarAssistant account has no sites attached.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This SolarAssistant unit is already configured.
abort.all_sites_configured: All sites on your account are already configured.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the SolarAssistant unit to fetch its metric list.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error while fetching the metric list.
